Custom Home
Tropical Modern

The Noosa Beach House

Noosa Heads, QLD
Completed 2024

About This Project

A relaxed tropical haven designed for family holidays and entertaining. This home embraces its coastal setting with lush landscaping, natural materials, and spaces that flow seamlessly to the outdoors.

Key Features

Direct beach access
Tropical gardens and pool
Open-air living pavilion
Surfboard storage room
Outdoor shower and BBQ area

Project Timeline

Build Duration
12 months

Project Specifications

Bedrooms
4
Bathrooms
3
Garage
2
Size
350 m²
Type
Custom Home
Style
Tropical Modern
